name: El Salvador Apaneca Santa Elena Pacamara Honey 250g — Medium+
author: Gene Cafe Roast Profilist
description:
Goal: Medium+ (Full City+ range), emphasizing caramel/milk-chocolate sweetness while keeping a hint of cherry fruit; finish with almond/nutty depth. Bean: El Salvador Apaneca-Ilamatepec, Pacamara, Honey, 1850m.

Gene Cafe setup:
- Batch: 250g.
- Preheat EMPTY to 205°C until stable (helps avoid sluggish mid-roast).
- Use external fast cooling after DROP (colander + strong fan) to prevent baked/flat cup.

Time formats used below:
- Elapsed mm:ss
- Gene-decimal minutes (minutes + seconds/60, rounded to 0.1)
- Reverse (time remaining on Gene display) assuming total 14:00

Targets (adjust next roast using your actual first-crack time):
- Drying end: ~04:30
- First crack: ~10:00–10:45
- Development: ~03:00–03:30 after 1C start (≈22–26% dev ratio)
- Drop: at the *first signs of 2C* (faster ticking) or just before if you want cleaner sweetness.

beanInfo.origin: El Salvador — Apaneca Ilamatepec (Santa Elena / Ilamatepec terroir); Producer: Fernando Lima

events.label: Charge / Start
events.instruction:
PREHEAT first: run empty at 205°C until stable.
Load 250g. Set total time 14:00 and set temp 165°C, press Start.
Elapsed 00:00 (0.0) | Remaining 14:00 (14.0)

events.label: Drying check
events.instruction:
At ~04:30 you want clear yellowing and reduced grassy smell.
If still green-ish, delay the 242°C step by 30–60s next roast OR preheat a bit higher.
Elapsed 04:30 (4.5) | Remaining 09:30 (9.5)

events.label: Push to 242°C
events.instruction:
Set 242°C to drive into first crack with enough energy for Medium+.
Elapsed 08:30 (8.5) | Remaining 05:30 (5.5)

events.label: First crack window opens
events.instruction:
Start listening hard for 1C (distinct snaps). If 1C is already rolling strongly, be ready to reduce at 10:15.
Elapsed 10:00 (10.0) | Remaining 04:00 (4.0)

events.label: Development control: 230°C
events.instruction:
Set 230°C to manage momentum through development (avoid runaway into 2C too fast).
Elapsed 10:15 (10.3) | Remaining 03:45 (3.8)

events.label: Nudge to 236°C
events.instruction:
Set 236°C to keep the roast moving toward Medium+ without stalling.
Watch for the aroma shift toward deeper caramel/cocoa and the start of quicker ticking (2C approaching).
Elapsed 12:30 (12.5) | Remaining 01:30 (1.5)

events.label: DROP
events.instruction:
Drop at first signs of 2C (faster ticking) for Medium+.
EJECT and cool externally fast (fan).
Elapsed 14:00 (14.0) | Remaining 00:00 (0.0)

Next-roast quick tweaks:
- Too dark / smoky / ashy: drop 15–30s earlier OR reduce the final setpoint to 232–234°C.
- Too light / peanutty / sharp: extend +15–30s OR keep 242°C an extra 15–30s before stepping down.
- Baked/flat: raise the early ramp (start 170°C) or preheat to 210°C.
